name: imgproxy
tagline: imgproxy - Fast and secure standalone server for resizing and converting remote images. For more info visit https://imgproxy.net/.
description:
imgproxy - Fast and secure standalone server for resizing and converting remote images. For more info visit https://imgproxy.net/.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  imgproxy:
    environment:
      IMGPROXY_BIND: 0.0.0.0:5000
      IMGPROXY_KEY: 57e20205e7445cbdaceaea70504d9c636dddbcd14797824b797c30ab759d6d1b
      IMGPROXY_SALT: b0d0a3b28a967a6967db59a2c85e0d8bab646a42a34e6b3ddbd1d5924e25e7ee
    image: darthsim/imgproxy:v3.6.0
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42053:5000
